Article.ArticleTitle: Strengthening recovery, enduring sleep. An ecologically valid assessment of sleep quantity and quality in hybrid athletes: does training mode matter?

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Medicine, Surgery and Health Sciences, University of Trieste, Strada di Fiume 447, Trieste, 34149, Italy. abuoitestella@units.it.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: None. Ethical approval: All the participants were requested to sign an informed consent. All procedures were approved by the IRB/ethical committee of the University of Trieste (protocol code 122/230522).
